name: @quoin/tokens-tailwind
description: Tailwind v4 default palette and scales (zinc neutral), translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Default v4 palette extracted byte-faithfully from packages/tailwindcss/theme.css. Tailwind v4 ships native OKLCH; values preserved verbatim. Neutral ramp = zinc. Extraction method: A. Mapping: Phase 3.5d composite refinement: shadow recipes match Tailwind v4's canonical box-shadow scale (sm/md/lg/xl/2xl) verbatim. Motion durations match Tailwind's transition-duration utilities (75/150/200/300/500ms).
